turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Visiting a Bank and Asking for Help with Banking Services

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Good morning, Kay. You please help me with my... with a problem that I have with my bank account.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good morning! Absolutely, I'd be happy to help. Could you let me know what specific issue you're experiencing with your account?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I tried to obtain my physical card, but I think the address that I put one month ago is wrong, so I never receive my physical card in this time.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I see, that can definitely be frustrating. No worries, we can sort it out. Could you confirm the address you had originally provided, and then we can update it if needed?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, it's this.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, thank you for that. Now, just to confirm, would you like us to resend the card to this updated address, and is there any other issue I should be aware of?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Now I would like to change in another address. The new address is...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that sounds good.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, I’ve got that noted down. Is there anything else I can assist you with regarding your account or the card?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What are the approaches that I have to do to receive my card?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Once we update the address, we’ll process the card and send it out to the new location. Usually, it takes about 5 to 7 business days for it to arrive. And of course, we’ll confirm everything once it’s sent out. Does that work for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, but can I receive an email the day before the arrive?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we can arrange that. I’ll make sure to set up an email notification for you the day before it arrives. Is there anything else you’d like to add or any other questions you have?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, I have another issue because I think my surname in my bank account profile is wrong.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand. We can definitely update that as well. Could you let me know the correct surname, and then we’ll make sure everything matches up properly?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “You have to change the N with the M.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, that makes sense. I’ll update that for you right away. Is there anything else you’d like to adjust or any other details I should know about?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Let me think... You give also some information about tax invoices?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I can definitely help with information about tax invoices. Are you looking to get details on how to access them, or do you have specific questions about them?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I have a specific question, but I would like, if it's possible, to book an appointment next week.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we can arrange that. Just let me know what day and time works best for you, and we’ll get that appointment scheduled. Sound good?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm free in early evening, so maybe on Wednesday or Thursday evening.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that works for me! I'll go ahead and book you for either Wednesday or Thursday evening. Once we finalize the time, I'll confirm everything with you. Sound good?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do you have my email?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, I do have it on file. I’ll make sure to send you a confirmation email with all the details as well. If you need to update it or have any other questions, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “If I have to do some changes in my profile, can I do it by myself or is it necessary that I came here again?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You can definitely make some changes on your own through our online banking platform. But if you need more complex updates, we can always schedule another appointment. Whatever’s more convenient for you!
